chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 863 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for Petitioners. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, DAG. ******************* Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar Advocate associate of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol by affecting his presence under instructions does not wish to press this constitutional petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
